name: OS & Low-Level Auditor
description: Audits OS host-hardening configuration (sshd, sudoers, sysctl, passwd/shadow, fstab) and scans C/C++ source for low-level memory-safety and command-injection bugs.
author: NisargHunter AI core

path.description: directory or repo checkout to audit

permissions.reason: Reads system config files and source code from the provided path only.
